mapper.sql: select pet_id, owner_user_id, pet_name, pet_gender, breed, birthday, age_month, weight_kg, avatar_url, social_tags, health_note, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from biz_pet_info
mapper.delete:
delete from biz_pet_info where pet_id in
#{petId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from biz_pet_info where owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} and status = '0'
